name: Nacre
description: Translucent refractive mother-of-pearl cell-field — a faithful port of the Milkdrop preset `$$$ Royal - Mashup (431)`'s jello-mirror character (drifting overlapping lens-cells, chromatic-fringed rims, pulsing central core, slow palette rotation) on Phosphene's mv_warp with HDR float feedback. Audio-coupled to overall energy and structure, not specific stems: the molten field swirls faster as the music fills out (turning ← average stem-energy envelope), surges on the downbeat (a display-stage camera push ← barPhase01), and rotates its palette with harmony (hue ← spectral-centroid deviation); base motion routes from the continuous bands (zoom ← mid, sway ← bass, grain ← treble). See docs/presets/NACRE_PLAN.md.
author: Matt
